creator: sobomax@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Xmps is known to be very buggy and unstable, so it's not our fault. Probably 
I will put some form of warning into xmms port, to make users aware of the fact. 
In the meantime I would recommend you to use smpeg pugin for xmms, which 
works nicely and contains the same features as xmps. You can install smpeg-xmms 
from ports/graphics/smpeg-xmms. 

Thank you for reporting!
